title: Best To Be Merry.
content:
Fools are they who never know
    How the times away do go;
    But for us, who wisely see
    Where the bounds of black death be,
    Let's live merrily, and thus
    Gratify the Genius.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Best To Be Merry."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
